prompt:
Goal: Create a highly detailed pastel anime bridal fashion collection sheet for Akai Haato, designed like a luxury wedding dress catalog page.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 3:4 aspect ratio, soft cream and blush-pink background, ornate gold filigree border, romantic rose garden and arched chapel-window atmosphere, sparkling light, falling petals, delicate lace textures.

Layout: Split the poster into a large full-body feature illustration on the left and a structured specification board on the right. Add a title and branding area across the upper right, a small signature/logo area upper left, detail panels in the middle right, and information boxes along the bottom.

Main subject: On the left, show one full-body anime bride wearing an elaborate white and pale pink wedding dress with strong deep rose red accents. The character has long blonde hair with pink tips, a flower crown, a translucent veil covered with tiny red bows and heart motifs, a frilly high-low skirt with layered lace, red ribbons, garter details, white platform bridal heels with ankle ribbons, and a large rose bouquet. Pose her standing gracefully with one leg forward, holding the bouquet at waist height. Keep the face area as a plain soft peach blank rectangle with no facial features.

Dress design: The gown is a cute gothic-lolita inspired bridal style: sweetheart bodice, off-shoulder lace sleeves, corset-like red ribbon lacing, many small bows, heart charms, scalloped lace, layered ruffles, asymmetrical high-low hem, long trailing back skirt, and a dramatic veil. The bouquet contains red roses, cream roses, blush roses, small greenery, and trailing burgundy ribbons.

Right-side detail panels: Include exactly 9 framed detail panels arranged as a 3-by-3 grid beneath the title. Label them in English with small hearts: 1) FRONT, showing the full dress from the front; 2) SIDE, showing the side silhouette and train; 3) BACK, showing the long veil, back bow, and trailing skirt; 4) BOUQUET, close-up of the rose bouquet; 5) BODICE, close-up of the corset bodice, lace, and red bow; 6) VEIL & RIBBONS, close-up of translucent veil fabric with red bows and heart decorations; 7) SHOES, close-up of white platform heels with red ribbon anklets; 8) HEART MOTIF, close-up of heart charm, lace, pearls, and bow; 9) BACK STYLE, close-up of the large back bow and layered rear skirt.

Top text content: Large elegant serif headline reading "WEDDING DRESS" with a cursive subtitle "Collection". Under it, place a ribbon banner reading "Akai Haato Bridal Style 2024" with heart icons on both ends. Add a short small Japanese-style romantic tagline beneath it, rendered decoratively and not overly legible.

Left branding text: In the upper left, write "Akai Haato" in pink cursive script with a small heart.

Bottom sections: Include exactly 3 bottom information areas. Left: a framed "DESIGN POINT" box with five short bullet lines and heart bullets, describing lace, heart motifs, ribbon bows, high-low skirt, and princess-like sweetness. Center: a "COLOR PALETTE" box with exactly 5 heart-shaped swatches labeled Pure White, Bride Red, Baby Pink, Rose Pink, and Antique Rose. Right: a romantic signature area reading "With Love," above a large cursive "Akai Haato", plus a small wax seal and ribbon emblem in the lower right.

Visual style: Premium anime illustration, Japanese idol character sheet, romantic bridal catalog, soft watercolor lighting, crisp ornate UI frames, pink and ivory palette, gold ornamental accents, floral border details, delicate lace rendering, glossy magazine-quality finish.

Constraints: Use English for all main headings and labels. Keep the poster information-dense but elegant. Use exactly one main full-body bride, exactly 9 right-side detail panels, exactly 3 bottom information areas, and exactly 5 color swatches. Avoid photorealism, avoid modern minimalist design, and do not add extra characters.
